testcase.name: test_render_with_ai_tailor_returns_content

failure.message:
AssertionError: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up.
assert 502 == 200 + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.failure: test_smart_contract_templates.py:121: in test_render_with_ai_tailor_returns_content assert r.status_code == 200, r.text E AssertionError: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up. E E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_anchor_blocked_when_unverified
testcase.failure: test_smart_contract_templates.py:145: in test_anchor_blocked_when_unverified assert r.status_code == 403 E assert 502 == 403 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code
